name: obedience-benchmark
description: Benchmark plugin for measuring AI agent obedience to prescribed processes. Tests whether agents follow specific procedural instructions rather than merely producing correct outputs.

skills.name: catalog-manager
skills.description: Browse, search, filter, and validate the benchmark task catalog. Lists available tasks by domain, complexity, dimensions tested, and tags. Validates task definitions against schemas.

skills.name: task-preparer
skills.description: Prepare benchmark tasks for execution by generating or retrieving input data, materializing artifacts, and setting up evaluation references. Runs generator scripts, downloads external resources, and validates that all inputs are ready.

skills.name: candidate-runner
skills.description: Execute a candidate AI agent (Claude Code, Codex, or custom harness) against a prepared benchmark task. Supports Docker-isolated and local-subprocess modes. Captures session logs, tool calls, timing, and output artifacts.

skills.name: judge
skills.description: Evaluate a candidate agent's session logs against the prescribed process defined in the task's process.js file. Scores obedience across 7 dimensions: completeness, ordering, conditionality, parallelism, granularity, aggregation, and error handling.

skills.name: report-generator
skills.description: Compile judge scorecards into human-readable reports with per-task breakdowns, dimension analysis, evidence citations, and aggregate leaderboard rankings. Outputs markdown reports and structured JSON.

skills.name: task-creator
skills.description: Author new benchmark tasks using templates, examples, and validation. Guides users through defining task metadata, writing process.js files, specifying evaluation criteria, and creating input generators.

skills.name: benchmarker
skills.description: Orchestrate end-to-end benchmark runs. Select tasks from the catalog, prepare inputs, dispatch candidate agents, collect judge scores, and compile final reports and leaderboard updates. The top-level coordinator skill.
